languages.text: "Сражаться вместе с вами я не собираюсь. Мне нужна слава и кровь этого чудовища, а вы только меня задерживаете. Пошли прочь".
"I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."
languages.original_text: "Сражаться вместе с вами я не собираюсь. Мне нужна слава и кровь этого чудовища, а вы только меня задерживаете. Пошли прочь".

traits.locale_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."
"I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."
"I have no intention of fighting alongside you. Glory is what I need. Victory will appease Batoshski. And I always win."
"I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."
"I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."

languages.text: 「君たちと戦うつもりはない。栄光こそ必要だ。勝利はバトシュスキーを満足させるだろう。そして私はいつも勝つ」
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. Glory is what I need. Victory will appease Batoshski. And I always win."

traits.locale_text: 「君たちと戦うつもりはない。栄光こそ必要だ。勝利はバトシュスキーを満足させるだろう。そして私はいつも勝つ。」

languages.text: "Sizinle omuz omuza savaşmaya niyetim yok. İstediğim tek şey, zafer ve o canavarın kanı. İkiniz de zaferimi geciktiriyorsunuz. Defolun gözümün önünden."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: "Sizinle omuz omuza savaşmaya niyetim yok. İstediğim tek şey, zafer ve o canavarın kanı. İkiniz de zaferimi geciktiriyorsunuz. Defolun gözümün önünden."

languages.text: «No tengo intención de luchar a su lado. Lo que quiero es gloria y la sangre de ese monstruo, y ambos interfieren en mi triunfo. Apártense de mi vista».
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: «No tengo intención de luchar a su lado. Lo que quiero es gloria y la sangre de ese monstruo, y ambos interfieren en mi triunfo. Apártense de mi vista».

languages.text: “我没打算跟你们并肩作战。我要的是荣耀和那怪物的血，你们俩反倒在这儿拖我后腿。离开我的视线。”
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: “我没打算跟你们并肩作战。我要的是荣耀和那怪物的血，你们俩反倒在这儿拖我后腿。离开我的视线。”

languages.text: « Je n'ai aucune intention de me battre à vos côtés. Je veux la gloire et le sang de ce monstre, et vous ne faites que retarder mon triomphe. Hors de ma vue. »
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai aucune intention de me battre à vos côtés. Je veux la gloire et le sang de ce monstre, et vous ne faites que retarder mon triomphe. Hors de ma vue. »

languages.text: "Ich habe nicht vor, an Eurer Seite zu kämpfen. Was ich will, ist Ruhm und das Blut dieses Monsters, und Ihr beide zögert meinen Triumph hinaus. Geht mir aus den Augen."
languages.original_text: "I have no intention of fighting alongside you. What I want is glory and that monster's blood, and you two are delaying my triumph. Get out of my sight."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe nicht vor, an Eurer Seite zu kämpfen. Was ich will, ist Ruhm und das Blut dieses Monsters, und Ihr beide zögert meinen Triumph hinaus. Geht mir aus den Augen."
